data.title: Circle and Dunamu signed a memorandum of understanding to advance cooperation in areas such as stablecoins.
data.description: USDC issuer Circle has signed a comprehensive Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Dunamu, the parent company of the South Korean trading platform Upbit, to collaborate on stablecoins and digital assets. The two companies are reportedly exploring cooperation plans including stablecoin applications and related educational programs, aiming to improve market participants' access to information and enhance trust within the South Korean digital asset ecosystem. Dunamu stated that this collaboration will also help promote compliant development and innovation in the local market. (News1)

data.title: DWF Labs Founder Predicts Older Coins Unlikely to Reach All-Time Highs
data.description: DWF Labs founder Andrei Grachev has expressed skepticism about the potential for older cryptocurrencies to achieve their previous all-time highs. According to NS3.AI, Grachev noted that while the market dynamics have evolved, many of these older projects have not adapted accordingly. This observation suggests a challenging future for legacy cryptocurrencies in the rapidly changing digital asset landscape.

data.title: Binance Wallet: The minimum requirement to claim the GENIUS airdrop is 230 points, and applying will consume 15 points.
data.description: Binance Wallet announced that Binance Alpha will list Genius Foundation (GENIUS) on April 13th at 19:00. Users holding at least 230 Binance Alpha Points can claim an airdrop of 240 GENIUS tokens on a first-come, first-served basis. If the reward pool is not fully distributed, the claim threshold will decrease by 5 points every 5 minutes. Participating in the claim will consume 15 Binance Alpha Points.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | U.S. Precious Metals Stocks Decline in Pre-Market Trading
data.description: In pre-market trading, U.S. precious metals stocks experienced a downturn. According to Jin10, Newmont Corporation saw a decline of 2.4%, while Coeur Mining, Inc. also fell by 2.4%. Additionally, Pan American Silver Corp. recorded a decrease of 1.7%.

data.title: Carson Block Warns of Potential U.S. Stock Market Turbulence
data.description: Carson Block, founder of Muddy Waters and a globally recognized short seller, has issued a stark warning about the U.S. stock market. According to Jin10, Block suggests that the market could experience volatility surpassing that of the 2008 financial crisis. He attributes this potential upheaval to the disruptive impact of AI technologies on the market. Block advises short sellers to prepare for opportunities, indicating that betting against the U.S. stock market might be favorable in the current environment.

data.title: Trader "Lovely Woman" shorted RAVE with 2x leverage, and is currently experiencing a paper loss of approximately $1.97 million.
data.description: OKX platform data shows that trader "Lovely Woman" currently holds a short position in RAVEUSDT perpetual contracts with a leverage of approximately 2.01x. Her position comprises approximately 392,000 RAVE tokens, with an average opening price of approximately $3.98. The current mark price is approximately $9.03, resulting in a floating loss of approximately $1.97 million and a return of approximately -253%.

data.title: Oil and Gas Stocks Strengthen in Pre-Market Trading
data.description: Oil and gas stocks showed strength in pre-market trading. According to Jin10, Battalion Oil saw an 18% increase, while Occidental Petroleum (OXY.N) rose by 3.42%, and ConocoPhillips (COP.N) gained 3.18%.

data.title: Hyperliquid Founder Rejects $100 Million Investment to Maintain Protocol Neutrality
data.description: Hyperliquid founder Jeff has declined a $100 million investment offer that valued the company at $1 billion. According to NS3.AI, Jeff expressed concerns that accepting outside capital might compromise the protocol's neutrality and conflict with its long-term objectives.

data.title: Polkadot responds to Hyperbridge vulnerability: Only Ethereum-side DOT is affected; mainnet assets are unaffected.
data.description: Polkadot responded to the Hyperbridge vulnerability incident, stating that the vulnerability only affects DOT assets bridged to the Ethereum network via Hyperbridge, and does not affect native DOT assets within the Polkadot ecosystem or assets using other bridging paths. The official statement confirms that the Polkadot mainnet and its parachains are functioning normally, and related assets remain secure. Hyperbridge is currently suspended, and the incident is under further investigation. Previous reports indicated that the Polkadot bridge vulnerability was exploited to issue 1 billion DOT tokens on the Ethereum network, which were subsequently sold off, resulting in an attacker profit of $237,000.

data.title: Hyperbridge Takes Emergency Measures to Address DOT Token Attack
data.description:
Blockchain interoperability protocol Hyperbridge has announced that it is implementing emergency measures to address an attack related to DOT tokens. According to Foresight News, the team has temporarily suspended all cross-chain operations via the front end and advised partners to halt external transactions, issue warnings, and remain vigilant where necessary.

Polkadot has clarified that the vulnerability only affects DOT tokens transferred cross-chain to Ethereum via Hyperbridge. The Polkadot ecosystem's DOT, its parachains, and native DOT remain secure and unaffected by this issue.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI to Establish First Permanent Office in London by 2027
data.description: OpenAI has announced plans to open its first permanent office in London by 2027. According to Jin10, this move marks a significant step in the company's global expansion strategy. The new office is expected to enhance OpenAI's presence in Europe and facilitate closer collaboration with partners and clients in the region. This development aligns with OpenAI's commitment to advancing artificial intelligence research and development on an international scale.

data.title: Solana Ecosystem's Meme Coin Neet Sees Significant Surge
data.description: On April 13, the Solana ecosystem's meme coin, Neet, experienced a substantial increase in market value, reaching $40 million, according to BlockBeats. The current price stands at $0.039, marking a 40% rise over the past 24 hours. Previously, on February 12, the market value of Neet had fallen below $7 million before rebounding and showing a steady upward trend in recent times.

data.title: USDD Withdraws $109 Million USDT from Spark Platform
data.description: USDD, under the leadership of Sun Yuchen, has recently withdrawn 109 million USDT from the lending platform Spark. According to ChainCatcher, this amount was subsequently added to USDD's PSM pool. Currently, the available liquidity for exchanging USDD to USDT stands at $42 million.

data.title: Gate Founder Dr. Han: Reshaping the Boundaries of Platform Capabilities with an AI Ecosystem and Multi-Asset Strategy
data.description: In his 13th-anniversary open letter, Gate founder and CEO Dr. Han disclosed the platform's current multi-dimensional business progress, highlighting the continuous deepening of its AI ecosystem and multi-asset system. He stated that AI is reshaping the boundaries of trading, risk control, and decision-making efficiency, becoming a crucial variable for platform capability upgrades. Around its Intelligent Web3 strategy, Gate is gradually building an AI product system encompassing Gate for AI, GateClaw, GateAI, and GateRouter. Simultaneously, Gate continues to deepen its multi-asset trading system, launching a TradFi trading zone and introducing traditional assets into spot and futures trading sections, covering stocks, metals, forex, indices, and commodities to meet users' cross-asset trading and allocation needs. Building on this, Gate launched a digital Pre-IPOs participation mechanism and opened a reservation portal, providing users with a new path to access high-quality global public offerings. Dr. Han pointed out that current industry competition is a contest of comprehensive system capabilities, and Gate, through continuous investment in trading depth, asset richness, and technological capabilities, has firmly established itself as a leading mainstream trading platform. In the future, the platform will continue to strengthen its infrastructure capabilities to bring users a safer and more efficient global digital asset trading experience.

data.title: BIT: Bitcoin ETF funds turn to net inflows, trend may approach the same period in 2025.
data.description: Analyst Markus Thielen stated that Bitcoin ETF inflows have recently turned positive and are on track for a second consecutive month of net inflows, indicating improved market sentiment. Data shows that the current flow pattern is highly similar to the same period in 2025. At that time, inflows were relatively flat at the beginning of the year, but then saw a concentrated inflow of approximately $30 billion, driving Bitcoin's continued rise in the following months. Analysts believe that the recent return of funds indicates that the market has gradually absorbed previous selling pressure, and the resumption of net inflows for the first time since March may provide support for future price movements.

data.title: GIGGLE Experiences Significant Price Surge
data.description: GIGGLE's price experienced a notable increase, briefly surpassing $41 before settling at $40. According to Odaily, the cryptocurrency saw an intraday rise of over 40%.

data.title: Iranian Military Comments on Persian Gulf and Gulf of Oman Security
data.description: On the 13th, a spokesperson for Iran's Khatam al-Anbiya Central Command stated that the security of the Persian Gulf and the Gulf of Oman ports is a matter that either belongs to everyone or no one. According to Odaily, analysts suggest that this statement from the Iranian military is a response to recent U.S. remarks about blocking Iranian port vessels and resuming actions against Iran.

data.title: South Korea Considers Including Digital Assets in Pension Calculations
data.description:
South Korea's Audit and Inspection Board has recommended changes to the country's pension system to include digital assets in the calculation of basic pension eligibility. According to ChainCatcher, the board's report highlights the economic value of digital assets, which are currently excluded from the property scope defined by the basic pension law. This exclusion allows individuals with substantial digital assets to qualify for pension benefits.

The board argues that digital assets should be recognized as property with clear economic value, despite their differing form from traditional financial assets. The Ministry of Health and Welfare agrees with this assessment, acknowledging the need to prevent relatively high-income individuals from the lower 70% income bracket from receiving basic pension benefits. The ministry supports the inclusion of digital assets in the property calculation for pension eligibility.

data.title: Japan Considers Remote Pacific Island for Nuclear Waste Disposal Site
data.description: Japan is reportedly considering a remote Pacific island as a potential location for a nuclear waste disposal site. Bloomberg posted on X that the proposal aims to address the country's ongoing challenges with nuclear waste management. The island's isolation is seen as a strategic advantage, minimizing risks to populated areas. This move comes amid Japan's efforts to enhance its nuclear waste disposal infrastructure, ensuring long-term environmental safety. The proposal is still in its early stages, with further assessments required to evaluate the site's suitability and potential environmental impact.

data.title: Whales Accumulate TRUMP Memecoin Before Mar-a-Lago Luncheon
data.description: Large investors, often referred to as 'whales,' have been increasing their holdings of the TRUMP memecoin in anticipation of the April 25 Mar-a-Lago luncheon. According to NS3.AI, one particular wallet has notably increased its holdings to 1.13 million tokens, valued at approximately $3.2 million. This accumulation suggests a strategic move by investors ahead of the event.
